items.title: Rising Texas river threatens same region where campers died in flooding
items.summary: The same area devastated by floods last year - causing more than 130 deaths - is once again being targeted by life-threatening floods.
items.whyItMatters: World and politics stories can shift public priorities, safety context, and what people need to understand next.

items.title: Israel tells Pentagon chief will keep troops in Lebanon, Syria, Gaza 'security zones'
items.summary: His comments come days after U.S. President Donald Trump asked Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to pull Israeli forces out of Syria and Lebanon
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: German Man Accused of Drugging and Filming the Rape of 14 Women
items.summary: The case has drawn comparisons to the Pelicot trial in France, which started a discussion across Europe about sexual assault and consent.
